payload.note: harness hardening: pack lint tarball, run-all-gates wrapper, template-v2 with pins; no task building

payload.main_checkout_dependence: none (grep over gates.json + gate logs + workspace package.json = 0 matches; pack-lint.sh initial read-only pnpm pack is the sole touch)
questions_unanswered: transitive deps not lockfile-pinned (only top-level exact pins; shrinkwrap rejected because it embeds file: paths)
lite tarball reused from dkr-5 unchanged — if main lite dist mutates like lint did, re-pack + re-pin needed
payload.replay_command: bash workers/pkr-harden/instantiate-v2.sh workers/dkr-5/reference-solution /tmp/replay-ws workers/dkr-5/harness/check-t7.mjs && bash workers/pkr-harden/run-all-gates.sh /tmp/replay-ws bin/main.ts check-t7.mjs
